title: SciER: Scientific Entity and Relation Extraction
description: Entity and relation extraction for scientific papers. Annotators identify scientific entities (Method, Task, Material, Metric, Generic) and link them with typed relations (Used-for, Feature-of, Hyponym-of, Part-of, Compare, Conjunction, Evaluate-for).
citation:
@inproceedings{luan-etal-2024-scier,
    title = "{SciER}: Entity and Relation Extraction for Scientific Documents",
    author = "Luan, Yi  and Wadden, David  and He, Luheng  and Shah, Amy  and Ostendorf, Mari  and Hajishirzi, Hannaneh",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2024 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing",
    month = nov,
    year = "2024",
    address = "Miami, Florida",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2024.emnlp-main.59"
}
